negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_78a3b823-3bb4-447a-afda-6959d37c8e2f
prompt: A tilt-down shot captures a modern, minimalist, beige architectural space centered around a serene courtyard. The scene showcases a central courtyard flanked by large windows on the second floor and glass walls on the first floor, allowing glimpses into elegantly furnished rooms. Spherical hanging pendant lights are visible through the sliding glass windows with wooden paneling on the second floor, as well as on the room straight ahead and a room on the right side of the frame on the ground floor. Lush greenery is strategically placed throughout the courtyard, with manicured trees and plants creating a natural yet curated atmosphere.  Two prominent trees stand on either side of the frame, their branches reaching towards the ceiling, while additional trees are visible inside the house. A narrow stone walkway, horizontally positioned, leads to a large, open dining area visible through tall glass doors. The dining space is part of an indoor area characterized by sophisticated furnishings, including a long beige dining table surrounded by modern white chairs with beige legs. Floor-to-ceiling windows ensure the indoor and outdoor areas blend seamlessly, allowing the outside to be visible. The outside is foggy, with trees slightly visible in the background. The ground is landscaped with small pebbles surrounding the reflection pools that flank the central walkway. These pools contain smooth, organically shaped rocks, enhancing the serene and natural aesthetic of the courtyard.  The room to the right of the frame also features a table, some chairs, and two objects on top of the table, one orange and the other red. The entire scene is shot in a straight tilt-down without cuts, capturing the symmetry of the beige design elements. Soft lighting illuminates the space, and the outdoor view reveals that it is daytime.
